headline: Dell's ISG Revenue Growth Strengthens: Will the Momentum Continue?
summary: DELL's ISG posts record $19.6B revenues in Q4 FY26 as AI server demand surges, with a $43B backlog and a projected $50B in AI revenues for FY27.

raw.headline: Dell's ISG Revenue Growth Strengthens: Will the Momentum Continue?
raw.summary: DELL's ISG posts record $19.6B revenues in Q4 FY26 as AI server demand surges, with a $43B backlog and a projected $50B in AI revenues for FY27.

headline: 3 of Wall Street’s Favorite Stocks That Concern Us
summary: The stocks in this article have caught Wall Street’s attention in a big way, with price targets implying returns above 20%. But investors should take these forecasts with a grain of salt because analysts typically say nice things about companies so their firms can win business in other product lines like M&A advisory.

headline: Vertiv Trades at a Premium Valuation: Should You Still Buy the Stock?

headline: Data Center Solutions Company Evaluation Report 2025: Dell, Broadcom and HPE Drive Growth with AI-Ready Servers, ASIC Networking and Consumption-Based Cloud Platforms
summary: The Data Center Solutions Companies Quadrant provides in-depth analysis of the global Data Center Solutions market. It evaluates 100+ companies, spotlighting the Top 15 leaders. This market incorporates infrastructure and software supporting compute, storage, and networking, crucial for modernizing IT environments and managing data demands. headline: ExxonMobil Is Up 44% and Retail Investors Are Still Missing the Point
summary: Amidst a growing international crisis heavily involving the price of oil, shares of ExxonMobil (NYSE:XOM) are trading at $149.78 as of Wednesday, up 24% year-to-date and 39% over the past year. Retail sentiment on Reddit has shifted from a monthly average score of 37.875 (bearish) to a weekly score of 53.5 (neutral) over the past ...
